title: Echoed Remnants
description: Adds many uses to echo shards, new armor, and a cool effect!
body:
This mod adds a new armor type, and a new effect!

<details>
<summary>Rose gold armor</summary>

![Rose gold armor.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1eef1f3be7bb889528b5e5994fd0fa8433d91472.png)
The Monocle: lets you see entities that make vibrations.\
The Pendant: protects you from vibrations such as the warden sonic boom.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Echoed effect</summary>

![Echoed effect.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe4ef50f230752f43e7eb2f5789c0498999edf2f_0.webp)
Visual changes:
- Adds a thick black fog
- Adds a blue and blurry overlay
- Makes the affected entity transparent (not compatible with shaders)
  
Gameplay changes: 
- Prevents any form regeneration
- Cannot break any block
- Suffocation damage while echoed pierces every form of protection (enchant/effect/armor)
- Allows the affected entity to phase through most blocks (cannot phase through wool)
- Regenerate while "suffocating" in sculk blocks

</details>



<details>
<summary>Obtaining content</summary>


<details>
<summary>Armor</summary>

![Rose gold recipe.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/434d5afc16222c963e0ce8ea59f9378b2dda0c94.png)

![Monocle recipe.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f72b9ab70dd6c796977186c3555eba6aba54f899.png)

![Pendant recipe.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/398f3351eb62230542abfefdaad1ca52b804af41.png)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Echoed Effect</summary>

![Active sculk shrieker with echo shards.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bfbf78c4b90219d7e2f162b1d988673b24888fb_0.webp)
Put echo shards into an active sculk shrieker then throw any food onto it.\
You can increase the duration of the echo effect by throwing a food onto the shrieker multiple times at the cost of another shriek.\
Each echo shard only lasts 4 shrieks until it is depleted

</details>





</details>


<details>
<summary>Additional features</summary>

Monocle lets you see echoed duration on foods.\
Pendant protects you from echoed effects and the monocle.

</details>
